narrative:
Gallipolis Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 927 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.9 percentage points.
